description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated, abstracted human figure rendered in a smooth, white stone or marble material. The figure is hunched forward, with its head bowed and arms resting on its knees, evoking a contemplative or sorrowful posture. The form is simplified, with minimal facial or anatomical detail, emphasizing the overall gesture and emotional tone. The sculpture sits atop a rectangular blue plinth, which contrasts with the warm-toned wooden floor beneath. The surface of the sculpture appears finely finished, with gentle curves and subtle shadows accentuating its shape. The setting suggests it is displayed in an indoor environment, likely a gallery or museum.
description: A smooth, white abstract human figure sits hunched on a blue plinth, its form simplified and contemplative. The sculpture is finely finished and displayed indoors.
description_view_0: From this view, the bowed head and hunched posture of the figure are clearly visible, with the arms resting on the knees and the blue plinth prominent.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the curvature of the back and the elongated arm, emphasizing the abstracted anatomy and the figure's forward lean.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the figure, with the shoulders and upper back forming a smooth, rounded silhouette atop the plinth.
description_view_3: This angle presents the side of the figure's torso and head, with the neck and back forming a continuous curve and the plinth's surface visible.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a blue plinth in an indoor gallery or museum setting with a wooden floor.
